name: writing-web-documentation
description: Write, rewrite, review, and organize developer-facing documentation for web software projects. Use when creating or improving README files, docs homepages, quickstarts, tutorials, how-to guides, API/reference pages, conceptual explanations, migration guides, or troubleshooting content for frontend, backend, full-stack, SDK, API, or framework-based web products. This skill applies strong information architecture, task-first page structure, clear voice, runnable examples, version and prerequisite
author: onmax
summary_zh: 专门用于编写和优化面向开发者的Web技术文档，适合从零搭建或重构各类技术内容，能帮你理清信息架构，写出结构合理、易于实操的优质文档。
